items.misreading: AGI here means generic AGI hype.
items.correction: Here AGI means Advanced Global Intelligence.

items.misreading: c = a + b is just symbolic rhetoric.
items.correction: It is used as a canonical architecture formula.
Here c is continuity-bearing and time-bound.
It is tied to cost, time, heat, maintenance, scarcity, and irreversibility.

items.misreading: SER is just another multi-agent framing.
items.correction: It is about entity continuity and sovereignty structure.

items.misreading: The book replaces the protocol layer.
items.correction: It is a narrative entry, not a substitute.

items.misreading: Entity and tool-agent mean the same thing here.
items.correction: They differ because continuity and responsibility differ.
